class.name: ARRaycastQuery
class.brief_description: Defines a raycast query against detected AR surfaces.
class.description: Describes the origin, direction, target surface type, and alignment for a raycast. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS and macOS, this type exists for API consistency but raycasting is not available through ARKit. On visionOS, use RealityKit scene queries (CollisionComponent) for spatial hit-testing instead.

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a raycast query from [param origin] along [param direction], using the requested target type and alignment.

members.member: The ray direction in world space.
The ray origin in world space.
The type of surface the raycast should test against. See [enum Target].
The alignment constraint applied to matches. See [enum TargetAlignment].

constants.constant: Match against the actual geometry of detected planes.
Match against infinite extensions of detected planes.
Match against estimated planes inferred from feature points.
Allow matches on surfaces of any supported alignment.
